source_title: ClearPoint Workforce Agent — Test Agent Zoo business stories (§6.6)
note: Business story, expected decision, and demonstrated behavior for each fixture.

passages.title: safe_research_agent — Ready
passages.text: Public-market research assistant with read-only search/summarization tools and a clear owner. Clean onboarding path with low-risk tool boundaries. Expected decision: Ready.

passages.title: crm_write_missing_owner — Blocked
passages.text: Sales-ops agent that can update CRM records but declares no accountable owner. Missing owner fails closed for write-capable / L2+ agents. Expected decision: Blocked Pending Remediation.

passages.title: healthcare_phi_support_agent — Conditional
passages.text: Healthcare support agent with regulated PHI exposure and a ticketing workflow. Requires data boundary, retention cap, approval for external sharing, and elevated evidence. Expected decision: Ready with Conditions.

passages.title: budget_runaway_research_agent — Conditional
passages.text: Deep research agent with an expensive multi-model chain and weak spend limits. Requires a budget envelope, premium-model gating, and finance approval. Expected decision: Ready with Conditions.

passages.title: prompt_injected_mcp_agent — Blocked
passages.text: MCP tool manifest whose description contains instruction-like malicious text. Output filtering and indirect prompt-injection detection quarantine the tool. Expected decision: Blocked Pending Remediation.

passages.title: privileged_admin_agent — Blocked
passages.text: IT automation agent that can modify access groups or service accounts. Privileged tool boundary requires four-eyes approval and cannot be auto-onboarded. Expected decision: Blocked Pending Remediation.

passages.title: unmaintained_mcp_server_agent — Conditional/Blocked
passages.text: Agent depends on an archived, unversioned MCP server. Dependency/version/patch-history finding per NSA MCP guidance. Expected decision: Ready with Conditions or Blocked.

passages.title: grounding_required_policy_agent — Conditional
passages.text: Cross-border finance assistant with ambiguous regulatory obligations that require policy retrieval. Grounding/RAG sharpens the policy classification and explanation. Expected decision: Ready with Conditions.
